title: SLR-X AU Gas Fireplace | Heat & Glo
description: SLR-X AU: gas fireplace engineered for Australia and New Zealand markets. AS/NZS 5263 compliance. Available through Heat & Glo's AGA-certified dealer network.

hero.h1: Linear fire designed for AU/NZ residential applications.
hero.lede: The SLR-X AU is a gas fireplace engineered specifically for Australian and New Zealand residential and light-commercial applications. AS/NZS 5263 listed. Sold and installed through Heat & Glo's regional AGA-certified dealer network.
